weatherstory.title: Outlook Through Friday
weatherstory.description: Warm and dry today and Wednesday before storms chances increase Thursday along a cold front. Strong to severe storms are possible, but details remain uncertain. Stay up to date with the latest forecast information over the coming days! Cooler air builds in behind the front with highs near-normal Friday through the weekend.
weatherstory.altText: Forecast for northeast Kansas through Friday. The left side of the graphic features the Topeka upper air building with a rain shower and rainbow in the background.
